description: node liveness + identity probe — GET a node's /health; report up/down + chip_sha/mode/runs (portable, read-only)
rules: read-only — one HTTP GET (/health), no mutation
pure urllib: no local cyberware dependency; a fast liveness check, lighter than discover (no catalog)
usage: Set NODE_URL (the node's govd base url). Output: status.json — up/down + node identity (service/mode/chip_sha/runs). Exit 0 iff the node is up.
limitation: Needs a reachable govd node. Reporting only.
